news.headline: Carbeeza Inc. plans private placement financing of up to 25M units at $0.05 each for max $1.25M gross proceeds.
news.summary: Carbeeza Inc. based in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed plans for a non-brokered private placement aiming to secure up to 25,000,000 units at $0.05 per unit, totaling potential gross proceeds of $1,250,000. Each unit comprises one common share of the Company and one common share purchase warrant, with each whole warrant allowing the holder to purchase one extra common share at an exercise price of $0.15 over a 24-month period from the date of issuance. The company trades on TSXV under the symbol AUTO and on OTCQB under the symbol CRBAF.

news.headline: Nutrien CEO Ken Seitz to speak at BMO Investor Conference on February 25 at 8:00am EST. Watch live at https://www.nutrien.com/investors/events.
news.summary: Nutrien Ltd. shared that its President and CEO, Mr. Ken Seitz, will participate in the BMO Global Metals, Mining, and Critical Minerals Conference on February 25 at 8:00am EST. The event will feature a fireside chat, accessible via video cast on the Company’s website. Nutrien, listed on TSX and NYSE as NTR, is a prominent global supplier of crop inputs and services recognized for its operational scale and reach. The conference where Ken Seitz will share insights is a significant gathering within the sector, attracting industry professionals and investors from around the world.

news.headline: Nutrien will feature CEO Ken Seitz and EVP Jeff Tarsi at BofA Investor Conference on Feb 26 at 10:30am EST.
news.summary: Nutrien Ltd. revealed that its CEO, Mr. Ken Seitz, and Executive VP, Mr. Jeff Tarsi, will present at the 2025 BofA Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 26 at 10:30am EST. The event will feature a video cast and can be accessed on the company’s website. Nutrien's stock is listed on the TSX and NYSE under NTR. This conference serves as a platform for the executives to engage with industry professionals and investors.

news.headline: US Veterans Magazine's Feb 2025 issue features Merryl Tengesdal, 1st Black woman to fly U.S Air Force's U-2 spy plane, and VP JD Vance.
news.summary: In the February 2025 edition of U.S. Veterans Magazine, recognition is given to individuals who have served in the military. Merryl Tengesdal, the first Black woman to pilot the U.S. Air Force's U-2 spy plane, is featured in a captivating cover story. Additionally, Vice President JD Vance is acknowledged for his outstanding service. This issue also highlights...

news.headline: Array appoints Emily Chhun as VP of Marketing to drive firm's success. Chhun brings 15 years of industry experience.
news.summary: A prominent litigation support firm, Array, based in Georgetown, Texas, has recently appointed Emily Chhun as its Vice President of Marketing on February 21, 2025. Chhun brings more than 15 years of experience in the industry to her new role. This strategic hire aims to enhance Array's marketing efforts and fuel the company's future success.

news.headline: Greenwich Library receives $5 million endowment for Signature Series programming, ensuring support in perpetuity.
news.summary: The Greenwich Library in Connecticut has recently been granted a substantial $5 million endowment to support its renowned Signature Series programming. This library is esteemed as one of the top libraries in the country, maintaining its status as the most frequented library in the state of Connecticut. The endowment is projected to significantly enhance the library's ongoing initiatives and events, ensuring the continuity and expansion of its valuable services for the community.

news.headline: Akel Homes sponsors 40th ArtiGras Festival as Presidential Sponsor, emphasizing commitment to arts in Palm Beach County.
news.summary: Akel Homes, a homebuilder located in South Florida, demonstrated its dedication to supporting the arts, community involvement, and cultural advancement in Palm Beach County by becoming a Presidential Sponsor of the 40th Annual ArtiGras Fine Arts Festival. The event took place in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on February 21, 2025.

news.headline: New 230V Varistat ionizer to remove static at a distance in industrial areas. CINCINNATI, Feb. 21, 2025 - PRWeb.
news.summary: CINCINNATI - As of February 21, 2025, the EXAIR Varistat® Benchtop Ionizer has been released in a 230-volt version to cater to industrial settings. This product, known for its accolades, is a robust static eliminator powered by a fan, designed to counteract static charges on various surfaces.

news.headline: One week left to participate in CobbleStone's 2025 State of Contract Management Survey. CobbleStone Software is a Leader in CLM according to the SPARK Matrix™ Report.
news.summary: Participants have until February 28, 2025, to take part in the CobbleStone 2025 Contract Management Survey. With headquarters in Princeton, NJ, CobbleStone Software is an esteemed provider of contract lifecycle management solutions, as per the SPARK Matrix™ Report.

news.headline: College dining halls need better safety measures for food allergies, lacking labels and epinephrine. Higher risk of reactions.
news.summary: Numerous college dining halls across the country lack crucial ingredient labels and emergency epinephrine autoinjectors, increasing the risk for individuals with food allergies. This issue was highlighted in a recent study conducted in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where it was found that a significant number of colleges fail to provide this essential information and emergency treatment. The study, conducted on February 21, 2025, revealed that the absence of ingredient labels and epinephrine autoinjectors in college dining halls has led to a higher incidence of food allergy exacerbations and anaphylaxis. This poses a serious threat to students and individuals with food allergies, emphasizing the need for improved safety measures in college campuses nationwide.

news.headline: ABC Legal, largest service of process provider, secures 5th DOJ contract for Int'l Process Serving.
news.summary: ABC Legal Services, LLC, the leading service of process provider in the country, has secured the renewal of its agreement with the United States Department of Justice (DOJ) to deliver International Process Serving assistance for the fifth time in a row. The renewal was confirmed on February 21, 2025, and solidifies ABC Legal Services' position as a key partner to the DOJ. This contract renewal underscores the company's expertise and reliability in managing international process serving operations, further highlighting its pivotal role in the legal domain.

news.headline: Hargrove Controls & Automation, a subsidiary of EPC firm Hargrove Engineers & Constructors, launches new website for automation solutions.
news.summary: Today, Hargrove Controls & Automation, a top industrial automation system integrator under global EPC company Hargrove Engineers & Constructors, revealed the launch of its new website. This initiative aims to enhance the delivery of their cutting-edge control system integration and automation solutions. The website will provide easy access to information about their services, benefiting MOBILE.

news.headline: SiteSeer releases updated ATOM tool for franchise territories, helping optimize with speed and precision. (Characters: 106)
news.summary: SiteSeer Technologies, a company based in Boise, Idaho, launched a new version of its Automated Territory Optimization Model (ATOM) tool on February 21, 2025. This upgraded tool is designed to assist expanding franchise businesses in efficiently and accurately optimizing territories. SiteSeer Technologies is known for its SiteSeer Professional site selection software. By utilizing the revamped ATOM tool, franchise companies can streamline their territory planning process with increased speed and precision, leading to more strategic decision-making. This innovation aims to enhance the performance of growing franchises and has the potential to impact a significant number of businesses in the industry.

news.headline: "POW! In The Park" offers free outdoor theater in Wilton Manors, Florida in collaboration with the city. Made possible by Warten Foundation.
news.summary: Wilton's Plays (POW!) and the City of Wilton Manors, Florida have partnered to introduce "POW! in the Park", a new initiative offering complimentary theater experiences to residents in South Florida. The project has been made attainable through the backing of the Warten Foundation. This collaboration aims to provide free theater performances to the public, fostering a vibrant cultural scene in the region. The launch event took place in Wilton Manors, Florida in February.

news.headline: AppStorys secures $5M to expand globally and enhance growth tools, with investors backing in-app and web engagement solutions.
news.summary: A technology platform known as AppStorys, which specializes in providing tools for in-app and web engagement, recently announced a successful funding round. The company has secured an impressive $5 million from a combination of venture capital firms and angel investors. The funding is intended to support AppStorys' international growth efforts and further advancements in technology. AppStorys offers a range of growth tools such as Stories, Reels, and PiP videos to enhance user engagement and experience on various digital platforms.

news.headline: ACS and Silverchair announce partnership to create new hosting platform for ACS's digital library; transforming access to content.
news.summary: In an exciting development, the Publications division of the American Chemical Society (ACS) has announced a groundbreaking partnership with Silverchair to create a state-of-the-art content hosting platform for ACS's vast digital library. The collaboration between ACS and Silverchair is set to revolutionize access to the extensive collection of resources. The partnership news was unveiled in Charlottesvile, Virginia and Washington on February 21, 2025. The collaboration promises to enhance user experience and optimize the accessibility of ACS's invaluable information and data. This new platform signifies a major step forward in facilitating research and innovation within the scientific community.

news.headline: Galfand Berger secures victory for client, L.T., who had left leg amputated at 7 after a lawnmower accident.
news.summary: A 7-year-old client of Galfand Berger had his left lower leg amputated by the blades of a riding lawnmower operated by his grandmother. The incident occurred due to the child backover hazard, where the operator mows the grass in reverse. This case highlights the dangers associated with riding lawnmowers and the need for caution when operating such equipment around children.

news.headline: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana set to release album "Sentient" on March 28, with collaborations and a new single out today.
news.summary: Today, on Friday, February 21, a new collection has been released featuring impressive partnerships with several legendary artists. Among these collaborations are works with Michael Jackson, Smokey Robinson, Miles Davis, Paolo Rustichelli, Darryl "DMC" McDaniels, and Cindy Blackman Santana. One of the highlighted tracks on this album is Santana's unique rendition of Smokey Robinson's "Please Don't Take Your Love."

news.headline: Visitor Guard® offers new 2025 US travel insurance plans - Venbrook Basic and Venbrook Premier, with medical expenses and trip protection.
news.summary: In February 2025, Visitor Guard® unveiled Venbrook Basic and Venbrook Premier, two new US travel insurance options. These plans come with extensive coverage encompassing medical expenses, emergency evacuation, and trip protection. Available in GLEN ALLEN, Va., the launch signifies the company's commitment to providing quality insurance solutions for travelers.

news.headline: TrackFive introduces TalentTrack, a virtual conference for travel healthcare staffing industry; includes brands TravelNurseSource, AlliedTravelCareers, LocumJobsOnline.
news.summary: TrackFive, along with its subsidiaries TravelNurseSource, AlliedTravelCareers, and LocumJobsOnline, is set to host its inaugural virtual conference, TalentTrack: The Online Event for the Healthcare Staffing Industry. This conference marks a significant milestone for the company as it ventures into the virtual event space. TalentTrack aims to provide a revolutionary platform for professionals in the healthcare staffing industry to network and engage. With a diverse array of speakers and workshops lined up, the event anticipates a substantial turnout from the industry.

news.headline: Velosio to host ERP Selection Masterclass in Atlanta on March 4, 2025 at the Westin Peachtree Plaza. Event targets business leaders, CFOs, IT professionals, and ERP consultants.
news.summary: Leading business technology provider Velosio is hosting a specialized ERP Selection Masterclass at the Westin Peachtree Plaza in downtown Atlanta on Tuesday, March 4, 2025. Tailored for business executives, CFOs, IT experts, and ERP advisors, this event offers practical guidance and firsthand experience for optimizing ERP selection and deployment.

news.headline: "Women We Admire announces Top 25 Women Chief Digital Officers of 2025 in NY, critical role in C-suite"
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 21, 2025 in New York, Women We Admire revealed The Top 25 Women Chief Digital Officers for the year 2025. This list celebrates the success and influence of women in the executive role of Chief Digital Officer, a position that is gaining prominence in corporate leadership. The selected women exemplify excellence in navigating the digital landscape, driving innovation, and shaping the future of technology. This recognition highlights the growing number of women excelling in this critical role within the top echelons of corporations.

news.headline: Ginnie Mae, A stalwart of the mortgage market, is being squeezed by the DOGE.
Mullen Group Ltd. declares $0.07 monthly dividend per Common Share, payable to holders of record on February 28, 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Okotoks, Alberta, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) revealed that its Board of Directors had approved a $0.07 monthly dividend for each Common Share. This dividend is set for payment on March 17, 2025, to all holders of record as of February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Cityside Fiber expands in Orange County, launching in Irvine, Lake Forest, Mission Viejo. Laguna Hills development begins. #InternetExpansion
news.summary: Development of Laguna Hills, the seventh community by Cityside Fiber, will commence in the forthcoming spring. The company, also known as Cityside Networks, LLC, is a prominent fiber-to-the-premise (FTTP) developer and internet service provider in Irvine, California. The expansion undertaken by Cityside Fiber signifies a substantial growth in their operations and services. The project is slated to begin on February 21, 2025, highlighting the company's dedication to expanding their reach and services.

news.headline: Investigation by Edelson Lechtzin LLP on UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH) for securities violations, urging affected investors to contact the firm.
news.summary: A law firm based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, called Edelson Lechtzin LLP, has announced on February 21, 2025, through PRNewswire, that they are currently looking into possible breaches of fiduciary duties and violations of federal securities laws related to UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH). The investigation stems from accusations of the company issuing misleading information in their business practices.

news.headline: FDA approves Ctexli for treating cerebrotendinous xanthomatosis in adults, a rare disease.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on February 21, 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval for Ctexli (chenodiol) for the management of cerebrotendinous xanthomatosis (CTX) in adult patients. This marks a significant breakthrough as Ctexli becomes the inaugural drug authorized by the FDA to address CTX, a particularly uncommon lipid storage disorder.

news.headline: Bybit CEO reports 'massive withdrawals' following $1.4B Ethereum theft, struggling with requests.
news.summary: Ben Zhou, the co-founder and CEO of Bybit, stated on Friday that the platform is facing challenges in processing withdrawal requests following a significant $1.4 billion hack.

news.headline: Investigation announced by Edelson Lechtzin LLP on Teladoc Health Inc. alleging misleading info, urging investors to contact.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, an investigation by Edelson Lechtzin LLP is ongoing regarding potential violations of federal securities laws by Teladoc Health Inc. (NYSE: TDOC). The company is accused of allegedly providing misleading business information to shareholders. Teladoc Health Inc.'s stock is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TDOC. Further updates on this matter will be provided as more information becomes available.

news.headline: Macklem urges against reconsidering 2% inflation target now, citing current economic conditions.
Ecuador OCP Crude pipeline shut down due to landslide impact.
Garcelle Beauvais named 2025 Changemaker by Parade for advocating and influencing; more honorees to be announced.
news.summary: In New York today, Parade, a distinguished entertainment and lifestyle brand, announced Garcelle Beauvais as the inaugural honoree for its new Changemakers 2025 project. This initiative recognizes individuals who are dedicated to addressing current societal challenges. Beauvais, a renowned actor, philanthropist, and reality TV personality, is the first of many to be honored. The Parade Editorial Board will unveil more honorees over the coming months. This program aims to highlight those actively working towards solutions for critical issues.

news.headline: Trump: We can drop illegal drug use by 50%.
FMCO purchases Varcode, Inc. assets, boosting growth and innovation. Deal closed on Feb 18, 2025. Varcode sees promising future.
news.summary: In a recent move, Four M Commercial Operations (“FMCO”) has successfully acquired almost all the assets of Varcode, Inc. The deal, finalized on Tuesday, February 18, 2025, is expected to bring about favorable synergies for both entities involved. This acquisition will not only benefit FMCO but also strategically position Varcode for substantial and lasting expansion opportunities. Chairman of Varcode, Inc., Dan Bergstein mentioned, “By becoming part of the FMCO business family, Varcode is taking a significant leap forward in its journey.”

news.headline: China SXT Pharmaceuticals, Inc. will consolidate shares at 1-for-8 on Feb. 25, 2025 with new CUSIP number G2161P157.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Taizhou, China, China SXT Pharmaceutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: SXTC) announced a share consolidation of its ordinary shares at a ratio of 1-for-8, effective February 25, 2025. The company focuses on Traditional Chinese Medicine Pieces, including various types of TCMPs and TCM Homologous Supplements. Following the Share Consolidation, the ordinary shares are set to begin trading on a post-consolidation basis on February 25, 2025, on The Nasdaq Stock Market under the symbol “SXTC” with the new CUSIP number G2161P157.

news.headline: Trump: I spoke with China’s President Xi on fentanyl and tariffs.
RevitPay appoints Jack Berry as Chief Revenue Officer, bringing 8 years of payments industry experience and success.
news.summary: In Cleveland, RevitPay, a prominent payment processing and merchant services company, has welcomed Jack Berry as their Chief Revenue Officer. Berry, who boasts more than eight years of experience in the payments sector and previously served as CSO at PaymentCloud, has a strong history of achievements. Notably, he oversaw major merchants and played a key role in establishing PaymentCloud's Cleveland office. Berry's appointment signifies RevitPay's commitment to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Suzanne E. Afflalo, MD recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her work as a Family Medicine Specialist and Community Advocate.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in San Diego, Dr. Suzanne E. Afflalo was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her work as a Compassionate Family Medicine Specialist and Community Advocate. Dr. Afflalo is acknowledged for her significant contributions in the field.

news.headline: Vijay S. Iyer, MD, Ph.D, FACC, is honored as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his work in Complex Cardiac and Structural Interventions.
news.summary: In East Amherst, New York on February 21, 2025, acclaimed cardiologist Vijay S. Iyer was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his expertise in Complex Cardiac and Structural Interventions. Dr. Vijay S. Iyer, MD, Ph.D., FACC, has made significant contributions to the field and is esteemed for his work in this specialized area.

news.headline: Carman Bailey named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for innovation in Safety and Environmental Health.
news.summary: In a recent news release on February 21, 2025, in Lagrange, Georgia, Carman Bailey has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his outstanding work as a Leading Innovator in Safety and Environmental Health. Bailey is praised for his significant contributions to the field.

news.headline: Nicole McConnell recognized as Most Trusted Healthcare Professional in Obstetrics and Gynecology by The Inner Circle.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Brandon, Florida, Nicole McConnell was recognized in The Inner Circle as one of the Most Trusted Healthcare Professionals for her significant work in Obstetrics and Gynecology. Holding Bachelor's degrees in both Psychology, Dr. McConnell stands out in her field.

news.headline: Dr. Andy Honda recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for medical leadership.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in New York City, Dr. Andy Honda was recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle and granted the title of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Dr. Honda's expertise lies in medical executive leadership, particularly in strategic implementation within medical communications and marketing. This recognition highlights her exceptional achievements in the field.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Our model shows that exports would fall 8.5% in the year after tariffs took effect.
FDA layoffs drastically reduced teams evaluating AI and food safety. Units reviewing surgical robots and insulin systems were hit hard despite industry-funded salaries.
news.summary: Departments responsible for assessing advanced surgical robots and insulin delivery systems faced significant staff reductions under the Trump administration, despite the fact that the salaries of these employees were funded by industry fees rather than taxpayer money.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: The updated BoC model shows Canadian output would fall almost 3% over two years if US imposed tariffs, all but wiping out growth forecast for 2025 and 2026.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: If U. tariffs are long-lasting and broad-based, there will not be a bounce back.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The initial impact of tariffs would be a one-time rise in prices, monetary policy must ensure higher prices do not become ongoing inflation.
Anchor Health Properties celebrates 40 years, focusing on medical outpatient buildings and specialty healthcare. Founded in 1985.
news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, on February 21, 2025, Anchor Health Properties (Anchor) announced its achievements since its establishment in 1985. Anchor is a prominent national company specializing in the development, management, and investment in healthcare real estate, with a particular focus on medical outpatient buildings and specialty healthcare facilities. With nearly 40 years of experience, Anchor has become a leader in this sector, managing a significant portfolio of properties across the country.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: The BoC wants to consider the interaction of monetary policy and housing, does persistently high shelter price inflation distort measures of core inflation?
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The renewal will look at whether the BoC needs richer monetary policy playbook and how to measure underlying inflation.
